scripts.build:cpu: vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && tauri build --config server/tauri.windows.cpu.conf.json
scripts.build:gpu: vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && tauri build --config server/tauri.windows.gpu.conf.json --features gpu
scripts.build:cpu:rotate: vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && tauri build --config server/tauri.windows.cpu.conf.json --features rotate
scripts.build:gpu:rotate: vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build && tauri build --config server/tauri.windows.gpu.conf.json --features gpu,rotate
